channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Humpback whale Timmy found dead off Danish coast
item.description: A humpback whale found dead off a Danish island has been identified as the one released two weeks ago in a controversial operation.

item.title: North America set for light display of aurora borealis
item.description: The nighttime phenomenon will be best observed on Saturday and Sunday nights.

item.title: A Republican who voted to convict Trump faces reelection. Can he survive?
item.description: Louisiana Sen. Bill Cassidy, one of seven GOP senators who voted to convict Trump, is now running for reelection.

item.title: New Ebola outbreak in Democratic Republic of Congo kills 87 people
item.description: Health officials are working to contain a new Ebola outbreak in the DRC of a virus strain with no known vaccine.
